scenario.name: crypto_signal_quality_walk_forward
scenario.target: separate always-on market-field target-price forecasts from historically stronger trade-quality subsets
scenario.note: Research benchmark only. The forecast always has an up/down target price; signal tiers decide whether historical evidence is strong enough to call it trade-quality. This is not financial advice.

tiers.name: all_forecasts
tiers.description: Every forced price forecast. This is the full research baseline, not a trade-quality filter.

tiers.name: broad_trade_quality
tiers.description: Broad evidence filter: component agreement plus moderate volatility guard.

tiers.name: strong_trade_quality
tiers.description: Stronger evidence filter with better historical direction hit at lower coverage.

tiers.name: high_conviction
tiers.description: High-conviction subset: fewer forecasts promoted to trade-quality.

tiers.name: large_move_directional_edge
tiers.description: Large predicted move diagnostic tier. Measures directional edge, not precise target-price quality.

tiers.name: consensus_edge
tiers.description: All policy components agree in a calm regime; low coverage, high historical direction hit.

tiers.name: strict_consensus_edge
tiers.description: Strictest calm-consensus edge tier. Useful as a signal-quality smoke test, not as coverage.
